description:
Upload any floor plan and instantly get a full-color 3D render powered by AI. Plus: redesign interiors and exteriors, furnish empty rooms, restyle floors, and reimagine gardens — all from your phone.
Whether you're a home design enthusiast, a room planner pro, or planning your next renovation, this app turns ideas into stunning visuals with no design experience or 3D modeling skills required.

Note: Free download includes onboarding and limited demo for evaluation. Full functionality requires a subscription.

Floor Plan to 3D

Turn any 2D floor plan into a realistic 3D visualization. The AI reads your layout as the single source of truth, preserving room counts, positions, proportions, and dimensions. Choose top-down, angled, or isometric views. Pick a style preset or keep it neutral for clarity. Perfect for house design presentations, home planner workflows, and quick layout maker tasks.

Interior Redesign

Snap a photo of any room and let AI redesign it in seconds. Try modern, minimalist, tropical, and dozens more styles. Great for renovation planning, remodel inspiration, and visualizing changes before you commit.

Exterior Redesign

Transform your home's exterior look with AI. Upload a photo and explore new styles, materials, and landscaping ideas. Ideal for curb appeal upgrades and house design exploration.

Garden Design

Reimagine your outdoor green spaces. Upload a photo of your garden, patio, or backyard and let AI restyle it with new plants, hardscaping, and layouts.
Great for landscape planning and seasonal refresh ideas.

Empty Space

Got a bare room? AI will furnish and decorate it for you. Perfect for staging, room planner mockups, and seeing the full potential of any empty layout.

Floor Restyle

Change the look of your floors without lifting a tile. Upload a room photo and explore new materials — hardwood, marble, concrete, patterned tile, and more. See exactly how a new floor transforms the space.

Why users love it

- AI preserves your original layout with no invented rooms or walls
- Generate multiple variations and compare with a swipe slider
- Remix any result — tweak style, colors, or furniture without starting over
- Export high-resolution images for sharing, presentations, and design boards
- Works with photos, scans, and screenshots
- No complex 3D modeling or grid setup required
- Your all-in-one home design creator and room planner

How it works

- Upload a floor plan, room photo, or exterior shot
- Choose your options (angle, style, space type)
- Generate, compare variations, and export your favorites

Great for

- Homeowners planning a renovation or remodel
- Real estate agents turning listings into shareable 3D visuals
- Architects and interior designers creating quick client previews
- Students learning home design and layout fundamentals
- Anyone looking for a 5D room planner alternative or house design inspiration

AI-generated results stay faithful to your original layout. Minor stylistic variations may occur.

Pricing & Access

An active subscription is required to access core features

Terms: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
